description:
| Class Code | Class Name         | Red | Green | Blue |
|------------|--------------------|-----|-------|------|
| 0          | No annual cropland | 240 | 240   | 240  |
This table defines the colour palette and attributes for Class Code 0, named "No annual cropland". The class is assigned an RGB colour value of Red: 240, Green: 240, and Blue: 240, which corresponds to a light grey colour. This specific table relates to the colour palette and attributes of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) CPBSBCL layer, which represents the Annual Cropland Base Seed Layer with Cropland Classification.
